info.name: TRRCMS — Mobile Sync Flow
info.description:
# TRRCMS — Mobile Sync Flow

**Audience:** Mobile/Tablet Development Team

**Purpose:** Complete 4-step LAN sync protocol for offline-first field tablets.

**Protocol:**
```
0. POST /Auth/login              → Get JWT token (FieldCollector role)
1. POST /sync/session            → Open sync session
2. POST /sync/upload             → Upload .uhc survey package(s)
3. GET  /sync/assignments        → Download building assignments + vocabularies
4. POST /sync/assignments/ack    → Acknowledge receipt
```

**Also includes:**
- GET /vocabularies — Fetch all controlled vocabularies (public, no auth)

**Environment:** `TRRCMS_Development.postman_environment.json`

**Companion docs:**
- `TRRCMS_Mobile_Sync_Integration_Guide.md` (v1.3) — Protocol, .uhc format, checksum algorithm
- Swagger UI: `https://localhost:7001/swagger`
- OpenAPI JSON: `https://localhost:7001/swagger/v1/swagger.json`

**Auth:** JWT Bearer token. Default field collector: `fieldcollector1` / `Test@123`

**Required Permission:** CanSyncData (System_Sync 9010)
**Roles:** FieldCollector, FieldSupervisor, Administrator

item.name: 0. Authenticate

request.description:
**Authenticate as Field Collector.**

No Bearer token needed for this request.

Auto-saves `accessToken`, `currentUserId` to environment for subsequent requests.

**Response fields:**
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| accessToken | string | JWT (15 min expiry) |
| refreshToken | string | Refresh token (7 days) |
| userId | GUID | Current user ID |
| fullNameArabic | string | User display name |
| role | string | User role name |
| accessTokenExpiresAt | ISO-8601 | Token expiry timestamp |

item.description:
Login to get JWT token. Run this first.

Default: `fieldcollector1` / `Test@123`
Admin: `admin` / `Admin@123`

item.name: 1. Vocabularies (Optional)

exec: console.log('  ' + v.name + ' v' + v.version + ' (' + (v.values ? v.values.length : 0) + ' values)');

request.description:
**Fetch all active vocabularies (public endpoint, no auth required).**

Use this for initial dropdown population before first sync.
Step 3 (GET assignments) also returns vocabularies, so this is optional after first sync.

**Vocabulary format:**
```json
{
  "id": "guid",
  "name": "building_type",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "category": "Building",
  "values": [
    { "code": 1, "labelArabic": "سكني", "labelEnglish": "Residential" }
  ]
}
```

**Vocabulary domains:** building_type, building_usage, building_condition, property_unit_type, floor_location, gender, nationality, relationship_to_head, relation_type, evidence_type, evidence_source_type, evidence_condition, survey_type

item.description:
Fetch vocabularies for dropdown population.

Public endpoint — no JWT required.
Also bundled in Step 3 (assignments download).

item.name: 2. Sync Protocol

request.description:
**Sync Step 1 — Open a sync session.**

Call this once per sync cycle. Returns `syncSessionId` needed for Steps 2-4.

**Request body:**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| fieldCollectorId | GUID | Yes | Logged-in user's ID |
| deviceId | string | Yes | Unique tablet identifier |
| serverIpAddress | string | No | LAN server IP |

**Response (SyncSessionDto):**
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | GUID | Session ID (use in Steps 2-4) |
| fieldCollectorId | GUID | Collector ID |
| deviceId | string | Device identifier |
| serverIpAddress | string? | Server IP |
| sessionStatus | int | 1=InProgress, 2=Completed, 3=PartiallyCompleted, 4=Failed |
| startedAtUtc | ISO-8601 | Session start time |
| completedAtUtc | ISO-8601? | null until session closes |
| packagesUploaded | int | Counter (starts at 0) |
| packagesFailed | int | Counter (starts at 0) |
| assignmentsDownloaded | int | Counter (starts at 0) |
| assignmentsAcknowledged | int | Counter (starts at 0) |
| vocabularyVersionsSent | string? | JSON of vocab versions sent |
| errorMessage | string? | null unless failed |

formdata.description: .uhc package file (renamed SQLite3 database). Select your .uhc file here.
Must match the deviceId used in Step 1
ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when package was created on tablet
SQLite schema version (from manifest schema_version key)
SHA-256 of data table contents (see Integration Guide Section 4 for algorithm)
Optional. JSON object mapping vocabulary domain names to versions used when creating the package.
Optional. Version of the mobile form schema used.

request.description:
**Sync Step 2 — Upload a .uhc survey package.**

**Content-Type:** multipart/form-data (auto-set by Postman)
**Max Size:** 500 MB

**Idempotent:** Same PackageId uploaded twice returns `accepted=true, isDuplicate=true`.

**Checksum verification:**
Server recomputes SHA-256 from the uploaded .uhc file and compares with `Sha256Checksum`.
Mismatch → `accepted=false`, session marked Failed.
See Integration Guide Section 4 for the exact checksum algorithm.

**Response (UploadSyncPackageResultDto):**
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| accepted | bool | true if package stored successfully |
| packageId | GUID | Echo of submitted PackageId |
| isDuplicate | bool | true if package was already received |
| message | string | Human-readable status message |
| importPackageId | GUID? | Server-side import package ID (null if rejected) |
| importError | string? | null on success; error details if import pipeline failed |

**Repeat this step** for each .uhc package before moving to Step 3.

exec: // Save assignment IDs for Step 4 acknowledgement
console.log('  Saved', ids.length, 'assignment IDs for Step 4');

query.description: Optional. ISO-8601 UTC. Omit for full download. Pass previous generatedAtUtc for incremental sync.

request.description:
**Sync Step 3 — Download building assignments and vocabulary snapshot.**

**Returns:**
- `assignments` — Buildings assigned to this collector (Pending/Failed status)
- `vocabularies` — Full snapshot of all controlled vocabularies (bilingual Arabic/English)
- `generatedAtUtc` — Save this value; pass as `modifiedSinceUtc` on next sync for incremental download

**Response (SyncAssignmentPayloadDto):**
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| syncSessionId | GUID | Echo of session ID |
| fieldCollectorId | GUID | Collector ID |
| generatedAtUtc | ISO-8601 | Payload timestamp (use for next incremental sync) |
| assignments | array | List of SyncBuildingDto |
| totalAssignments | int | Count of assignments |
| vocabularies | array | List of SyncVocabularyDto |
| vocabularyVersionsSentJson | string | JSON of vocabulary versions included |

**SyncBuildingDto fields:**
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| assignmentId | GUID | Assignment ID (use in Step 4 ack) |
| buildingId | GUID | Building entity ID |
| buildingCode | string | Human-readable building code |
| transferStatus | int | 1=Pending, 2=InProgress, 3=Transferred, 4=Failed |
| geometry | GeoJSON | Building polygon |
| address | string | Building address |
| neighborhoodName | string | Neighborhood |

**Incremental sync:** Pass `modifiedSinceUtc` to get only assignments created/modified after that timestamp.

exec: // Auto-populate assignmentIds from Step 3 if available

request.description:
**Sync Step 4 — Acknowledge successful assignment download.**

Confirms the tablet has stored the assignments received in Step 3.

**Idempotent:** Already-acknowledged assignments are silently skipped.

**Effect:** Each assignment transitions Pending/Failed → Transferred.

**Session closes after this step:**
- Completed (2) — all packages OK
- PartiallyCompleted (3) — some packages failed checksum

**Pre-request script:** Auto-populates `assignmentIds` from Step 3 response.

**Request body:**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| syncSessionId | GUID | Yes | Session from Step 1 |
| assignmentIds | GUID[] | Yes | Assignment IDs from Step 3 response |

**Response (SyncAckResultDto):**
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| acknowledgedCount | int | Successfully acknowledged |
| failedCount | int | Failed to acknowledge |
| failedAssignmentIds | GUID[] | IDs that failed (empty on success) |
| message | string | Human-readable result |

item.description:
## 4-Step Sync Protocol

**Flow:** Session → Upload → Download → Acknowledge

```
Step 1: POST /sync/session          → Open session
Step 2: POST /sync/upload            → Upload .uhc package (repeat per package)
Step 3: GET  /sync/assignments       → Download assignments + vocabularies
Step 4: POST /sync/assignments/ack   → Confirm receipt
```

**Session lifecycle:**
- InProgress (1) → Completed (2) after Step 4
- InProgress (1) → PartiallyCompleted (3) if some packages failed
- InProgress (1) → Failed (4) on checksum mismatch

**Idempotency:** Steps 2 and 4 are idempotent. Safe to retry on network failure.
